positive: A whimsical, stylized floral forest scene, featuring bioluminescent oversized flowers and delicate woodland animals like hummingbirds and foxes. The composition must be centered, with a strong contrast between dark, magical foliage and glowing pops of cyan, magenta, and electric green light. Use a flat vector illustration style with thick, clean outlines and limited, vibrant color palette, giving it a perfect silhouette aesthetic. The artwork should be highly stylized for fabric printing, ensuring seamless, repeat-friendly elements and clear separations. Cinematic, high contrast, sticker book quality, perfect for apparel design.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, dirty, low-res, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, ugly, hyperdetailed, photorealistic, 3d render
